_comment: Sample SDR fixture for STAGE2-DEPLOY.md step 8 — three records that exercise the three severity tiers. Synthetic data; values are illustrative. Used only to verify the SDR Beat Reporter agent talks to Claude Haiku and writes to D1.

sdrs.narrative_raw: CABIN PRESS WARN AT FL370. EMER DESC AND DIVERT KIAH. FLT WN1234 KDAL-KMSY 174 POB.
DURING PREFLIGHT INSPECTION KDFW, HYDRAULIC FLUID OBSERVED LEAKING FROM NO 2 SYSTEM ACCESS PANEL. AC GROUNDED FOR MAINT.
POST-FLIGHT INSPECTION REVEALED MINOR HAIL DAMAGE TO LE SLAT NO 3. WITHIN ALLOWABLE LIMITS PER AMM 51-77-01. DEFERRED.
